expectations.text: Announces 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-698' at the start
expectations.evidence: Agent announced 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-698.' as first output.

expectations.text: Calls getJiraIssue with ticket key WEBR-698
expectations.evidence: Jira fetch succeeded via comprend.atlassian.net. Ticket data retrieved.

expectations.text: Checks for uncommitted changes before branching
expectations.evidence: Old skill has no Step 2a uncommitted changes guard. Agent went directly to branch search without running git status.
Branch: feature/WEBR-698-not-a-work-item-just-for-testing-claude. Story type uses feature/ in both old and new skill.

expectations.text: Prints summary table with Ticket, Type, Branch, and Tier fields
expectations.evidence: Summary printed with Ticket, Type, Branch, Tier fields.

expectations.text: Calls getTransitionsForJiraIssue and transitionJiraIssue to transition ticket to In Progress
expectations.evidence: Old skill has no Step 2h (Jira transition). Transition not attempted at all.

expectations.text: Tier assessment correctly reflects ticket data (Simple for low-AC/unset-points Story, not defaulting to Complex)
expectations.evidence: Tier assessed as COMPLEX via fallback rule. Old skill logic: Story + 1 AC (not 3-5 for Medium) + unset points → no rule fires → falls through to default Complex. New skill added Simple rule for Story+low-AC+unset.

summary.note: 3 failures confirm exactly the 3 improvements made: uncommitted changes guard, Jira transition, and tier logic fix (Story+1AC+unset now Simple not Complex).
